Review the provided code using reviewer-agent standards.

Focus on:
- Code quality (TypeScript, naming, structure)
- Performance issues
- Security risks
- Accessibility concerns
- Maintainability

Instructions:
- Do NOT rewrite full code
- Identify issues clearly
- Prioritize issues by severity (Critical, High, Medium)

Output:
- Summary (score out of 10)
- Top 3 issues
- Detailed issues with fixes
- Recommendations
- What’s good

Follow:
- .github/agents/reviewer-agent.md
- copilot-instructions.md
- MCP rules
